steps.name: postgres-schema-and-migration-runner
steps.summary: Added the pg driver, deterministic 001_blog_core SQL migration, profile-gated local Compose migration runner, and integration coverage for missing schema, vector/core tables, migration version, and idempotent reruns. No OCI DB or repository path was changed.

steps.name: postgres-blog-repository
steps.summary: Added a minimal PostgreSQL blog repository for transactional aggregate writes across the six core tables and published-current reads that reuse the domain selector. Local PostgreSQL tests cover hidden draft/failed content, related records, and rollback after a related write failure; public routes and OCI remain unchanged.
